ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "dest" TEXT /* Destination blockchain network where the token is used */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the token */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the token */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the token on the destination blockchain network */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin blockchain network of the token */,
  "sourceAddress" TEXT /* Source address of the token on the origin blockchain network */,
  "sourceDecimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token on the origin blockchain network */,
  "coingeckoId" TEXT /* Coingecko ID for the token */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL to the token's logo */,
  "serumV3Usdc" TEXT /* Serum V3 USDC address for the token */,
  "serumV3Usdt" TEXT /* Serum V3 USDT address for the token */,
  "contract_version" TEXT /* Version of the smart contract associated with the token */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the token is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the token's metadata */,
  "chain_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the blockchain network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer event */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token being transferred */,
  "source_address" TEXT /* Source address of the token transfer */,
  "destination_address" TEXT /* Destination address of the token transfer */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the token transferred */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the token transfer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transfer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the token transfer */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash of the transfer */,
  "network_fee" REAL /* Network fee paid for the transfer */,
  "source_chain_id" TEXT /* Blockchain network ID of the source address */,
  "destination_chain_id" TEXT /* Blockchain network ID of the destination address */,
  "is_cross_chain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the transfer is cross-chain */,
  "memo" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_transfers_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_transfers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, auditor) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity on the platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access to the platform */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* Secret key for the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address associated with the balance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the balance */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the token */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the balance was last updated */,
  "source_chain_id" TEXT /* Blockchain network ID of the source address */,
  "destination_chain_id" TEXT /* Blockchain network ID of the destination address */,
  "is_cross_chain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the balance is for a cross-chain token */,
  "lock_status" TEXT /* Lock status of the balance (e.g., unlocked, locked) */,
  "lock_until" TEXT /* Timestamp until which the balance is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_balances_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)
